evals.expected_output: Use the ja3-fingerprint skill for this ja3 fingerprint request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects ja3-fingerprint for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_ja3.
Keeps the response focused on generating JA3/JA3S TLS fingerprints for client and server identification, malware C2 detection, and cyberspace mapping.

evals.prompt: Compute the JA3 fingerprint for a TLS connection to example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the ja3-fingerprint skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects ja3-fingerprint instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
